inputs.label: Ticket Cost per Line
inputs.businessContext: Standard cost of one EuroMillions ticket line in euros. Default 2.50 EUR.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard cost of one EuroMillions ticket line in euros. Default 2.50 EUR.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir EuroMillions bilet satırının standart maliyeti euro cinsinden. Varsayılan 2.50 EUR.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardkosten einer EuroMillions-Ticketlinie in Euro. Standard 2,50 €.

inputs.label: Lines per Draw
inputs.businessContext: Number of lines played per draw. Default 1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of lines played per draw. Default 1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çekiliş başına oynanan satır sayısı. Varsayılan 1.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der pro Ziehung gespielten Linien. Standard 1.

inputs.label: Draws per Week
inputs.businessContext: Number of EuroMillions draws per week (typically 2 on Tuesday and Friday).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of EuroMillions draws per week (typically 2 on Tuesday and Friday).
businessContext_i18n.tr: EuroMillions haftalık çekiliş sayısı (genellikle Salı ve Cuma olmak üzere 2).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der EuroMillions-Ziehungen pro Woche (normalerweise 2, dienstags und freitags).

inputs.label: Number of Weeks
inputs.businessContext: Number of weeks of continuous play.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of weeks of continuous play.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Wochen mit durchgehendem Spiel.

inputs.label: Bulk Discount
inputs.businessContext: Percentage discount for multi-draw or subscription purchases (0-100).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage discount for multi-draw or subscription purchases (0-100).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çoklu çekiliş veya abonelik alımlarında yüzde indirim (0-100).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentualer Rabatt für Mehrfachziehungen oder Abonnements (0-100).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
